name: RogueLLM Mobile Compact Composition Gate
intent: Keep the fixed mobile UI on a single short-phone canvas with enough room for map inspection, newest story text, open log or inventory drawers, combat state, and touch controls.
visualGoal: A premium handheld game surface should read as one physical device, with clear hierarchy and no hidden lower log/control content on a 390x667 mobile canvas.
rules: Closed-state regions must not overlap each other.
The map must remain the primary surface without taking over the phone canvas.
The latest-message surface must be readable while leaving dedicated toggle wells.
Open log and inventory drawers may overlay status/player/combat content, but they must not consume the bottom control deck.
The bottom control deck must stay anchored to the artboard bottom on short phones.
Runtime title, stat, combat, drawer, and button slots must remain contained by their owning contract regions.
D-pad and action buttons must keep fixed touch targets; visual polish cannot shrink them.
Skin art may frame these zones, but Phaser owns all runtime text, icons, meters, and game state inside them.
